premises: ih : count n xs = count n (sort xs)
lemmas.conclusion: count n (x :: xs) = count n (sort (x :: xs))
lemmas.statement: (ih : count n xs = count n (sort xs)) : count n (x :: xs) = count n (sort (x :: xs))

lemmas.conclusion: count n xs = count n (sort xs)
lemmas.statement: (n : ℕ) (xs : List ℕ) : count n xs = count n (sort xs)
